action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current environment state, including the active drug batch, patient profile, and simulation settings.

action_set_definitions.name: update_simulation_sensitivity
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the biochemical detection threshold for the simulation environment.

action_set_definitions.name: analyze_drug_interactions
action_set_definitions.description: Runs a pharmacological simulation to identify biochemical interactions based on the current batch and patient profile.

patient_profile.description: The physiological data of the patient.

action_set_definitions.name: remove_drug_from_batch
action_set_definitions.description: Removes a specific drug compound from the active screening batch to resolve contraindications.

drug_name.description: Name of the drug to remove.

action_set_definitions.name: update_interaction_history
action_set_definitions.description: Records identified interactions into the persistent session history log.

interactions.description: List of interaction objects to record.

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_screening_session
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the final safe batch and closes the screening session.

state_description.active_screening_batch: A list of drug compounds currently being combined in the virtual testing environment.
state_description.patient_physiology_profile: Metadata regarding the simulated patient (e.g., age, renal function, liver enzymes) that affects drug metabolism.
state_description.simulation_sensitivity: The detection threshold for minor biochemical interactions.
state_description.interaction_history: A record of all identified interactions discovered in the current session to ensure incremental knowledge.
